# MSI Claw 8

RGB 命令
# 水波、彩虹、慢速、顺时针
0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 01 fd 01 06 00 00 00 00 00 00
0010   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0020   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

# 水波、彩虹、中速、顺时针
0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 01 fd 01 03 00 00 00 00 00 00
0010   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0020   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

# 水波、彩虹、快速、顺时针
0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 01 fd 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0010   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0020   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00



水波 0x10位为速度控制 慢速 0x06、中速 0x03、快速 0x00

0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

## 单色常亮
```
# 常亮 红色
0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 02 00 19 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00
0010   00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00
0020   ff 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00


# 常亮 绿色
0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 02 00 1a ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff
0010   00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00
0020   00 ff 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

# 常亮 蓝色

0010   ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff 00 00 ff
0020   00 00 ff 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

# 常亮 白色
0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 02 00 1a ff ff ff ff ff ff ff
0010   ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff ff
0020   ff ff ff 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

# 常亮 255,126,0
0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 02 00 1a 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e
0010   00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00
0020   ff 7e 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 01 ff 1b ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff
0010   7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e
0020   00 ff 7e 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

0010   7f ff 00 7f ff 00 7f ff 00 7f ff 00 7f ff 00 7f
0020   ff 00 7f ff 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

0000   0f 00 00 3c 21 01 01 fd 1c 03 64 ff 7e 00 ff 7e
0010   00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00
0020   ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

0020   7e 00 ff 7e 00 ff 7e 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0030   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
```
